body.docName: 导入集采平台药品配送明细
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/drug/distribution-detail/import 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/drug/distribution-detail/import 
 ## 接口描述 
药品配送明细导入，将集采平台业务系统中的药品配送明细数据推送至医招智付应用。

以药品配送明细编码作为唯一键，重复导入时进行更新操作。

批量接口，允许部分成功。

单次导入上限为1000。
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveNo","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%B9%E5%87%86%E6%96%87%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%22%E5%9B%BD%E8%8D%AF%E5%87%86%E5%AD%97H20183260%22","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"batchNumber","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%B9%E6%AC%A1%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%22241216005%22","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contactName","maxLength":"50","label":"%E8%81%94%E7%B3%BB%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%8C%BB%E9%99%A2%E4%BC%9A%E8%AE%A1%E9%83%A8%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterpriseCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22P03066%22","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterpriseName","required":false,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8D%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%8D%8E%E4%B8%9C%E5%8C%BB%E8%8D%AF%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E8%B4%A3%E4%BB%BB%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22","desc":"%20","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverStatus","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%22sended%22","desc":"%20sended%20-%20%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%EF%BC%9B%20%20received%20-%20%E5%B7%B2%E6%94%B6%E8%B4%A7%0A%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%E5%88%99%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E 接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/drug/distribution-detail/import

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/auto-inventory/drug/distribution-detail/import

接口描述

药品配送明细导入，将集采平台业务系统中的药品配送明细数据推送至医招智付应用。

以药品配送明细编码作为唯一键，重复导入时进行更新操作。

批量接口，允许部分成功。

单次导入上限为1000。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveNo","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%B9%E5%87%86%E6%96%87%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%22%E5%9B%BD%E8%8D%AF%E5%87%86%E5%AD%97H20183260%22","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"batchNumber","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%B9%E6%AC%A1%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%22241216005%22","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contactName","maxLength":"50","label":"%E8%81%94%E7%B3%BB%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%8C%BB%E9%99%A2%E4%BC%9A%E8%AE%A1%E9%83%A8%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterpriseCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22P03066%22","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterpriseName","required":false,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8D%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%8D%8E%E4%B8%9C%E5%8C%BB%E8%8D%AF%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E8%B4%A3%E4%BB%BB%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22","desc":"%20","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverStatus","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%22sended%22","desc":"%20sended%20-%20%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%EF%BC%9B%20%20received%20-%20%E5%B7%B2%E6%94%B6%E8%B4%A7%0A%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%E5%88%99%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","ma
